name: Medium Intimate
description: Two figures close together, tight framing.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Two figures close together, intimate framing.
{setting}. Two figures sharing close space, the world blurred behind them.
{setting}. Two figures drawn together, tight and warm.
background_pool: A softly lit bedroom interior, warm lamplight pooling on a nightstand, rumpled linens in cream and muted tones, curtains half-drawn over a window with dusk light filtering through, everything beyond the figures rendered in soft focus

A cozy window seat with cushions and a thrown blanket, rain streaking the glass behind, the world outside blurred to grey and green, warm interior light on the figures, steam rising from cups on the sill
A garden bench at golden hour, the background a wash of blooming roses and lavender in soft focus, warm backlight creating a halo effect around the figures, petals scattered on the path
A fireside setting, the warm glow of low flames casting amber light, a stone hearth and stacked logs behind, the room beyond falling away into comfortable shadow, a woven blanket draped nearby
action_pool: leaning their forehead against the other
hand resting on the other's cheek
turning their face toward the other
arm draped around the other's shoulders
hand flat against the other's chest
breath visible in the cold air between them
